title: Studio UI - Quick Settings enabled
scenario: Quick Settings toggle does not persist or function correctly when enabled in the Poly Studio Mobile app UI
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the Quick Settings icon (gear or shortcut icon) on the Home screen.
Verify that the Quick Settings panel or overlay is displayed.
Check the available toggles/options in the Quick Settings panel (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer presets, etc.).
expected: Quick Settings panel is displayed with relevant audio device toggles and options accessible from the Home screen.
